title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND SEVENTY-FOUR OF THE REVISED ADMINISTRATIVE CODE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1420 / 44 OG No. 12, 4709 (December, 1948)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 282, June 16, 1948 ]

AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTION SIXTEEN HUNDRED AND SEVENTY-FOUR OF THE REVISED ADMINISTRATIVE CODE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section sixteen hundred and seventy-four of the Revised Administrative Code, as amended, is further amended so as to read as follows:

"SEC. 1674.

Assistant provincial fiscals.

âIn the following provinces there shall be assistant provincial fiscals in such numbers and with such salaries as are hereinafter provided:

"Bohol, three assistant provincial fiscals, one at three thousand pesos, another at two thousand eight hundred pesos and the third one at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

;

"Cagayan, two assistant provincial fiscals, three thousand pesos and two thousand four hundred pesos, respectively,

per annum

;

"Cotabato, two assistant provincial fiscals at two thousand eight hundred pesos

per annum

each;

"Ilocos Norte, two assistant provincial fiscals at two thousand eight hundred pesos

per annum

each;

"Ilocos Sur, one assistant provincial fiscal at two thousand eight hundred pesos per annum, and one at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

;

Isabela, one assistant provincial fiscal at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

;

per annum

;

"Agusan, one assistant provincial fiscal at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

;

"Zamboanga, one assistant provincial fiscal at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

; and

"Sulu, one assistant provincial fiscal at two thousand four hundred pesos

per annum

;

"These officers shall be appointed by the President of the Philippines with the consent of the Commission on Appointments of the Congress of the Philippines, and their salaries shall be paid by the provinces concerned. The salary of the assistant provincial fiscal shall be included in the annual appropriation of the province in the same manner as the salary of the provincial fiscal. To be eligible foil appointment to this position, a person must be a citizen oil the Philippines who has been duly admitted to practice in the court of said Islands, and has been in actual practice for at least five years, prior to his appointment."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1948.
